name: conditional-get contract: a 304 proves freshness by updating last_checked while leaving content_hash untouched
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/conditional-get.sh" --source-id aws --store-dir "$PWD/s" --simulate-status 200 --etag e1 --body-hash original >/dev/null 2>&1; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/conditional-get.sh" --source-id aws --store-dir "$PWD/s" --simulate-status 304 --now 2026-06-08T09:00:00Z && ruby -rjson -e 'h=JSON.parse(File.read("s/aws.json")); STDERR.puts("hash="+h["content_hash"]); STDERR.puts("checked="+h["last_checked"]) '
